health.description: Lightweight liveness probe returning service availability for load balancers and monitors.

getOnboardingSession.description: Retrieve the current onboarding session state for a given session identifier.

submitOnboardingEmail.description: Submit or update the applicant email address as part of contact verification during onboarding.

retryOnboardingEmailVerification.description: Request a new email verification code or retry the email verification step.

submitOnboardingPhone.description: Submit or update the applicant phone number for SMS or call verification during onboarding.

retryOnboardingPhoneVerification.description: Request a new phone verification code or retry the phone verification step.

upsertApplicantProfile.description: Create or replace the applicant profile details collected during onboarding.

listOnboardingAddresses.description: List addresses captured while the user is still in the onboarding session flow.

createOnboardingAddress.description: Add a new address record associated with the onboarding session before party finalization.

updateOnboardingAddress.description: Update an existing onboarding-session address (partial update).

listPendingOnboardingRequirements.description: List outstanding onboarding requirements or checklist items the applicant must satisfy.

createOnboardingDocumentMetadata.description: Register metadata for a document uploaded or linked during onboarding (for example type and storage reference).

listDocumentsForOnboardingSession.description: List documents linked to an onboarding session before or after party creation.

submitOnboardingForReview.description: Submit the completed onboarding package for internal review or underwriting handoff.

getPartyBySessionId.description: Resolve and return the party record linked to the onboarding session, if one exists. After approval, partners may also receive the same payload via the party.ready outbound webhook.

registerOnboardingSessionWebhook.description: Register or update the HTTPS URL (and optional signing secret) where Rhino POSTs a party.ready event when internal onboarding is approved with a party_id.

getParty.description: Fetch a party profile and core attributes for a known party identifier.

listPartyAddresses.description: List all addresses on file for the party after onboarding has produced a party record.

createPartyAddress.description: Add a new address to the party’s permanent address book post-onboarding.

updatePartyAddress.description: Update an existing party address (partial update).

listAvailableLoanProductsForParty.description: List loan products this party is eligible to apply for, typically filtered by rules or catalog.

createLoanApplication.description: Create a new loan application for the authenticated or implied borrower context.

getLoanApplication.description: Retrieve the full loan application record including status and key fields.

updateLoanApplication.description: Update editable fields on a draft or in-progress loan application.

submitLoanApplication.description: Submit a loan application for credit decisioning or operations review.

listPartyApplications.description: List all loan applications associated with a given party.

listLoansForParty.description: List loans booked or visible to the party (borrower-facing loan portfolio view).

getLoanForParty.description: Return details for a single loan that belongs to the party.

listLoanScheduleForParty.description: Return the amortization or repayment schedule installments for the loan.

listLoanBalancesForParty.description: List historical or periodic loan balance snapshots for the loan.

getLatestLoanBalanceForParty.description: Return the most recent outstanding balance and related figures for the loan.

listPaymentMethodsForPartyLoan.description: List saved payment methods the borrower may use for this loan.

createPaymentMethodForPartyLoan.description: Tokenize or register a new payment method for repayments on this loan.

updatePaymentMethodForPartyLoan.description: Update metadata or default flags on an existing borrower payment method.

createPaymentIntentForPartyLoan.description: Initiate a borrower payment (intent or charge) against the loan balance.

listTransactionsForPartyLoan.description: List payments, fees, and other ledger transactions visible to the borrower for this loan.

listCollateralForPartyLoan.description: List collateral items securing the loan as exposed to the borrower portal.

listDelinquencyForPartyLoan.description: Summarize delinquency status or cases associated with the loan for borrower visibility.

listCommunicationsForPartyLoan.description: List borrower-visible communications tied to collections or servicing for this loan.

listDocumentsForPartyLoan.description: List documents (statements, notices, disclosures) available for this loan in the portal.
